executive_summary: All FRs and USs comply. No blocking gaps. Two minor observations recorded for optional future work.
minor_observations: Path-resolution asymmetry: checkpoint.py passes absolute path to load_checkpoint(); split/split_4b pass only filename stem to load_unet/load_clip/load_vae.
vae_decode_audio returns only the waveform tensor (not a dict); callers fetch sample_rate separately. Differs from ltxv_audio_vae_decode convention.
Test patches target source module attributes — correct for lazy imports, but worth documenting to prevent breakage if imports are ever hoisted.
